root_text.an5.145:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.145:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāyī hoti.
root_text.an5.145:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.145:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.145:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā paṭivirato hoti.
root_text.an5.145:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.145:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.145:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, and consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.145:1.4: Someone with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.145:2.1: Someone with five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there
translation_text.an5.145:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, or consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.145:2.4: Someone with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
